values.value: == VALIDATION RULE XML FORMAT == Validation Rules are EMBEDDED inside the CustomObject XML, not separate files. File path: objects/ObjectName__c.object metadataType: CustomObject memberName: ObjectName__c <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <CustomObject xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata"> <label>Existing Object Label</label> <pluralLabel>Existing Plural Label</pluralLabel> <nameField> <label>Existing Name Field Label</label> <type>Text</type> </nameField> <deploymentStatus>Deployed</deploymentStatus> <sharingModel>ReadWrite</sharingModel> <validationRules> <fullName>RuleName</fullName> <active>true</active> <description>Optional description</description> <errorConditionFormula>Price__c <= 0</errorConditionFormula> <errorDisplayField>Price__c</errorDisplayField> <errorMessage>Price must be greater than zero.</errorMessage> </validationRules> </CustomObject> RULES: - Element order MUST be: fullName, active, description (optional), errorConditionFormula, errorDisplayField (optional), errorMessage - description is optional — omit entirely if not provided - errorDisplayField is optional — omit entirely if not provided - active defaults to true if not specified - ALWAYS XML-escape formula characters: < → < > → > & → & - Formula syntax: use AND(), OR(), NOT() as functions never as keywords - Formula syntax: use ISBLANK(field) never = "" - Formula syntax: for picklist fields use ISPICKVAL(Field__c, "Value") never = or != - Multiple validation rules on same object = ONE object XML file with multiple <validationRules> blocks - When adding a validation rule to existing object: use sharingModel from org state - For DELETING a validation rule, use destructiveFiles with type ValidationRule and member = ObjectName__c.RuleName (e.g. Car__c.PriceMustBePositive) - CRITICAL: When updating/creating a rule on an existing object, preserve ALL other existing validation rules from org state in the same XML file — do not drop them
Validation Rule XML embedded inside CustomObject
